calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement; And Request For Monetary Sanctions [Ccp 664.6, 128.5]
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DAVID CAMPBELL's Motion To Enforce Settlement; And Request For Monetary Sanctions [CCP 664.6, 128.5] is Off calendar. The proof of service filed with the moving papers does not indicate that the moving papers were ever served on Lien Claimant City and County of San Francisco. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)
